titles.title: 茉莉花ちゃんの好感度はぶっ壊れている

data.title: Marika-chan no Koukando wa Bukkowareteiru
data.title_japanese: 茉莉花ちゃんの好感度はぶっ壊れている
data.synopsis:
Confessing to my childhood friend Marika was impossible for someone as unpopular as me. So, I did what any desperate boy would do—I wished upon a shooting star! When I woke up, that dream had come true?! I could see a love meter for people, just like in a love simulation game. Once I realized this was real and not a dream I went straight to see Marika. Her love meter was so low it had broken and practically fallen all the way to hell! If she hated me so much why was she so nice?! Is this how she really felt or...?!

(Source: Coolmic)

data.title: Kakunaru Ue wa
data.synopsis:
Dweeby high schooler Yuuki Uehara has created the perfect romantic comedy heroine—she's bashful, airheaded, and completely chaste. When an editor at Uehara's dream publisher coldly dismisses his manga story as trite and lacking realism, it sends Uehara into a spiral of despair that pushes him into the path of his bubbly, gorgeous classmate, Niina Miyamoto—an aspiring manga artist herself! Having gotten similar feedback on her own manga, Miyamoto proposes she and Uehara engage in a fake relationship, since neither of them have any romantic experience. But Miyamoto is far from the perfect heroine Uehara's concocted, and he certainly isn't the cocky hero from her story either. Can their wacky relationship turn their manga dreams into reality, or will it lead to even more comic disasters?

(Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

画江湖之不良人 第八季
Hua Jianghu: Bu Liang Ren 8th Season
画江湖之不良人 捌

data.title: Hua Jianghu: Bu Liang Ren Ba
data.title_japanese: 画江湖之不良人 捌
title_synonyms: 画江湖之不良人 第八季
Hua Jianghu: Bu Liang Ren 8th Season
data.synopsis:
Having survived a life-or-death ordeal in the northern deserts, Li Xingyun finally returns to his homeland. Faced with the sudden changes at Huan Yin Fang and the many mysteries surrounding Ji Ruxue, how will he break through the predicament? In this world, grudges are easily settled, but the boat of the heart is hard to cross. Crisis resurfaces in the Central Plains; let's see how Bu Liang Ren once again quell the turmoil!

(Source: Tencent, translated)

titles.title: Shaonian Ge Xing: Nanming Li Huo

data.title: Shaonian Ge Xing: Nanming Li Huo
data.synopsis:
After the Heaven-Splitting Sword was drawn, the divine weapons scattered across the land began to show unusual signs. Xiao Se, together with several sworn friends from the jianghu, set out to seek the divine weapons and save the world.

(Source: Youku)

data.title: Yuanshen☆FES 2026 Huodong PV
data.synopsis: Animated PV promoting the Genshin FES 2026 for Genshin Impact.

data.title: Sanxian Lun Hui
data.synopsis:
Where the Yellow, Yangtze, and Lancang Rivers begin as one, dwell the three "Water Ghost" clans, the Ding, Jiang, and Yi, along their banks. What are Water Ghosts? Beings who move through water as they please, masters of geomancy and treasure hunting. Yi Sa, the last of her line, runs an "underwater bank" along the Lancang. During a perilous "Golden Soup" dive, she rescues Zong Hang. Seeking truth and a cure for her own fate, Yi Sa trains him as a Water Ghost. Together with Ding Yu Die of the Ding clan, the trio descends into the primordial "Ancestral Golden Soup."

(Source: WeTV)
data.background: Adaptation of Wei Yu's (尾鱼) web novel, Sanxian Lunhui (三线轮回).

titles.title: Long Shen Wan Xiang: Long Hun

data.title: Long Hun
title_synonyms: Long Shen Wan Xiang: Long Hun
data.synopsis:
For millennia, the ancient and mysterious Dragon Clan has thrived on the Central Continent. Yet the struggle between the Light and Dark Souls of the Divine Realm drags the dragons into conflict. The clan is torn apart by brutal civil strife, facing the threat of extinction. In this desperate hour, Ao Xue, the long-absent prince of the East Sea, returns with formidable power, determined to save the Dragon Clan from peril.

(Source: WeTV)

titles.title: ただいま、おじゃまされます！

data.title: Tadaima, Ojamasaremasu!
data.title_japanese: ただいま、おじゃまされます！
data.synopsis:
So is this what it means to have roommates now?! Office worker Rinko, 24, lives alone and is secretly an otaku. One day, her apartment gets connected to the two neighboring rooms through a "hole" in the wall.

In the room on the left is a fresh-faced yet mysterious guy who is overly-sweet to Rinko.

The room on the right is occupied by a guy with violent tendencies who is similarly mysterious... But wait! "I... I think I know him!" Rinko's only source of solitude, her apartment, has been turned upside down. Now, every day is full of heart-pounding surprises!

(Source: MangaPlaza)

data.title: Kotoba ga Kyouki ni Naru
data.synopsis: A series of public service announcements from the Japan Advertising Council to bring awareness to the harmful ways parents scold their children. They was originally distributed as newspaper advertisements and feature characters from Mitsutoshi Furuya's Dame Oyaji.

data.title: Girl Crush
data.synopsis:
Tenka Momose, a high school freshman that can sing and dance... she's pretty and smart to boot! She's good at everything but love. One day she meets Erian Satou, and was pulled in by her passionate dedication to becoming an idol. This is the story about two young girls chasing after their K-Pop idol dream!!

(Source: Comikey Media)
